Localization.Description: Exploitation of the CVE-2024-24919 vulnerability that allows attackers to read any files on Check Point firewall devices without authorization. The vulnerability is in Check Point software with the IPSec VPN, Remote Access VPN, and Mobile Access blades enabled.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to exploit the CVE-2024-24919 vulnerability that allows for reading any files on Check Point device {event_src.host} from host {src.host}. Attackers tried to read file "{datafield4}".
Exploitation of the CVE-2024-24919 vulnerability that allows for reading any files on Check Point device {event_src.host}. Attackers read file "{datafield4}".
